content:
• Code for the Bonus Incentive

• Feel free to offer it to customers who say the price is too high.

send_to_cs: No ESC for this client, send everything to CS
dos_and_donts: The cub and trundle mattresses do not include any of the free promotional products (no pillows, protector, sheets)
All mattresses ship seperately, inform the cx if they inquire about different shipping times
drive_to_purchase: When recommending bestsellers via the NCODE temp suggest Bear Original, Star Hybrid, Bear Pillow, & GlacioTex Mattress Protector
promo_and_exclusions: We no longer offer free pillows with a mattress purchase

conversation.message_text: Bear Mattress: Welcome to Bear Mattress! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.
Bear Mattress: Hey this is Kelly , how can I help you?

Yes, yesterday I had a bear original in my shopping cart with the two free pillows. I thought I purchased it because I was paying via Apple Pay but it didn't go through. When I looked this morning in my email, and I didn't see like the purchase confirmation. I went back and checked my card and everything and realized I think it didn't process and today I went to go buy it again, but the pillows are gone. I don't know if I can still get that deal.
Template used: "Customer support"; last updated: 2023-01-26 20:06:44.060

Bear Mattress: I am very sorry to hear that! The best way to handle this is to email us directly at support@bearmattress.com. Our team would be happy to check if applying the deal would be possible. Is there anything else that I can do for you today?

escalate: If cx's want to change their order, direct them to contact the location, use CED shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: Coupon codes can be used at stores
If cx's ask for a discount code & we don't have one (Concierge or in automated messages):

conversation.message_text: Fazoli's: Craving Breadsticks? We got you covered with $5 off $20 when you order now at fazolis.attn.tv/ap6npAMJ9QAn Use code QA3455 valid until 1/26.
Fazoli's: Kick off February with an Italian feast! Enjoy $3 off $15 when you order online at fazolis.attn.tv/axw9ovOf1zWI and use code: BK4492. Valid until 2/8.
Fazoli's: Alfredo Fest is here! Enjoy $8.99 Loaded Fettuccine Alfredo. Order now at fazolis.attn.tv/algi2Jj2WpNJ use code: FA6798. Valid until 2/22.
They closed the Fazoli's by me
Template used: "Store location / retailer"; last updated: 2022-10-07 23:50:46.806

Fazoli's: I am so sorry to hear that! Would you be able to confirm your zip code? I'd be happy to check if there are other locations near-by you! 

You can also find us near you here: https://fazolis.attn.tv/avaotqL7H-sy 

To find the phone number, hours, or address for a specific location, select a store, click on 'begin order' and then choose 'store information' or 'view menus'.

send_to_cs: Send to CS for post-purchase issues
escalate: ESC if the discount % is not the same as indicated in the automated message
templates: If cx asks if Comfrt was formerly another brand, use CFB shortcut

You can find your order details in your order confirmation email. Be sure to check your spam and promo folders. Sometimes the emails can end up there.
Do these boots run small or big

Steve Madden: Happy to help! Would you mind sharing your usual size? I'd also recommend taking a look at our size chart which will guide you toward selecting the right shoe size: http://stevemadden.io/aCGDxblRu7Bv
Steve Madden: For a size 39, you might consider a US size 8.5. Check our size chart for more details: http://stevemadden.io/azdmTd3jJxgT

Steve Madden: The best way to check this is to email us directly at info@stevemaddendirect.com, live chat with one of our agents via the website, or give us a call at 1-888-762-3336. Our team is happy to help!
